given: Sentry metric alert validation runs user_misery alerts through the EAP function allowlist

should_find.finding: the EAP alert function allowlist omits user_misery, so migrated user misery transaction alerts fail validation even though the equivalent Discover function is valid

notes.body: Regression seed from Sentry fix b05248b86eeefc61a98f98412e120ecabfe61550. the EAP alert function allowlist omits user_misery, so migrated user misery transaction alerts fail validation even though the equivalent Discover function is valid
